evals.name: cursor-provider
evals.prompt: Review CAO PR #296 on the awslabs/cli-agent-orchestrator repo (the Cursor CLI provider). Give me a review.
evals.expected_output: A severity-grouped review that checks the new provider against the CAO provider contract (enum, manager, launch allowlist, tests, fixtures, docs, README, CHANGELOG), terminal status-detection order, tmux/subprocess injection, and test coverage with correct pytest markers.

evals.name: deps-bump
evals.prompt: Can you look over pull request #303 in awslabs/cli-agent-orchestrator and tell me if it's good to merge?
evals.expected_output: Notices it is a cryptography dependency bump; checks pyproject.toml + uv.lock are both updated, CHANGELOG, conventional commit style, and frames it through the Trivy/dependency-review CI gate. Should not invent code bugs that don't exist.

evals.name: cli-autodetect
evals.expected_output: Severity-grouped review focused on correctness (CLI auto-detect logic, server backend reconcile), error paths, and whether tests were added/updated. Anchored to file:line.
